RE: PLAINTIFF RALPH MORALES' Motion For An Order Allowing Him To Depose His Expert Witness In March 2024.

Benjamin Rudin, Esq., Law Office of, (858) 256-4429, for Plaintiff.
Alexandra C. Seibert, Esq., of HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP, (415) 288-9800, for Defendant.

Plaintiff and Defendant stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem. Both parties and the judge pr tem (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation on their behalf.
